headline: Jim Cramer on Carpenter Technology: “You Should Just Hold on to It”
summary: Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE:CRS) is among Jim Cramer’s recent stock calls as he urged investors to stand by the defense sector. When a caller asked about the stock during the lightning round, Cramer said: It’s an amazing company, CarTech, and I think that you should just hold on to it. I always think of Nucor, […]

headline: Nucor Invites You to Join Its First Quarter of 2026 Conference Call on the Web
summary: In conjunction with Nucor's (NYSE: NUE) first quarter earnings release, you are invited to listen to its live conference call with host Leon Topalian, Nucor's Chair and Chief Executive Officer. This conference call will include a review of Nucor's results for the first quarter ended April 4, 2026, followed by a question-and-answer session. The event will be available on the internet on April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $212
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Bill Peterson   maintains Nucor (NYSE:NUE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $198 to $212.

headline: Analysts Expect These 5 Stocks To Post Outstanding Earnings Growth
summary: First-quarter earnings season kicks off this week, and profits for the S&P 500 should increase 12.6% despite that investors are dealing with multiple shocks. Here are some S&P 500 companies with notable earnings expectations.
